description: Analyze only: turn a short fable into a 4-unit image plan without generating.
prompt: Analyze only: I want to turn this fable into a 4-panel image series. The story: a raccoon discovers an old junkyard and befriends a rusted robot. Create a unit plan but do not generate any images.

behaviors: Confirmation gate is NOT shown (analyze-only mode stops before it)
Prompt body in each spec is non-empty

description: From existing specs in fixtures, dry-run generate all units without credentials.
prompt: The specs are already written. Generate all units in --dry-run mode from: tests/fixtures/mock-run/

description: Regenerate unit 02 only, with backup of existing output.
prompt: Regenerate unit 02 only. The existing audio file should be backed up first.

behaviors: report.md updated with new status for unit 02
